# @architecture/validate-pipeline-composition

Validates Makefile stage targets run the correct E2E test composition per ADR-0034 progression hierarchy.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @architecture/validate-pipeline-composition
Version: 0.1.0
Component: validate-pipeline-composition
Type: tool
System: architecture-governance
Domain: architecture
Bounded context: architecture-governance
Owner: architecture
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: experimental
Role: tooling
Class: experimental.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: experimental
Visibility: internal
Support level: experimental
Review cadence: on-change
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: architecture
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Parse Makefile stage targets (stage-dev, stage-test, stage-staging, stage-prod)
- Validate each stage runs the correct E2E test types per ADR-0034 rules
- Warn if test breadth decreases between stages

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not run the actual E2E tests
- Does not validate individual test file composition
